name: RakuAI Engine API
description: Curated public API reference for AI-assisted game creation. This manifest exposes game-creation functions only. Engine internals are intentionally excluded.
license: Proprietary — API definitions provided for game development purposes only. Reverse engineering prohibited.

subsystems.name: RakuCore
subsystems.description: Memory management, threading, signals, IO, logging. Foundation for all subsystems.

subsystems.name: RakuScene
subsystems.description: Scene graph, node hierarchy, transforms, spatial queries, instancing.

subsystems.name: RakuRenderer
subsystems.description: PBR materials, post-processing, VRS, mesh manipulation, render graph.

subsystems.name: RakuXR
subsystems.description: OpenXR 1.1, hand/eye tracking, spatial anchors, controller haptics, passthrough.

subsystems.name: RakuPhysics
subsystems.description: Rigid body, collision detection, raycasting, CCD, soft body, destruction.

subsystems.name: RakuAudio
subsystems.description: Spatial audio, HRTF, adaptive music, audio streaming, voice capture.

subsystems.name: RakuAnimation
subsystems.description: Skeletal animation, blend trees, IK, morph targets, spring bones.

subsystems.name: RakuAI
subsystems.description: Dynamic difficulty, player profiling, emotion detection, NPC behavior, adaptive systems.

subsystems.name: RakuSLM
subsystems.description: On-device Small Language Model inference. Privacy-first, no cloud calls.

subsystems.name: RakuNetwork
subsystems.description: Multiplayer networking, WebRTC, matchmaking, state replication.

subsystems.name: RakuVoice
subsystems.description: Voice commands, speech recognition, voice chat, text-to-speech.

subsystems.name: RakuInput
subsystems.description: Keyboard, mouse, gamepad, touch, gesture recognition.

subsystems.name: RakuUI
subsystems.description: UI widgets, layout, text rendering, themes, accessibility.

subsystems.name: RakuAssets
subsystems.description: Asset loading, caching, streaming, format conversion.

subsystems.name: RakuEditor
subsystems.description: Runtime editor tools, inspector, debug visualization.

subsystems.name: RakuScripting
subsystems.description: Game scripting, event system, .raku file parsing, game lifecycle.

game_creation_workflow.description: How AI should use this API to create games:
steps: 1. Generate a .raku JSON file conforming to the schema at https://rakuai.com/schema.json
2. Choose a template from the 10 available (see schema 'template' enum)
3. Define entities with types, properties, and AI behaviors
4. Configure AI personalization (DDA, profiling, emotional tracking)
6. Include ai_disclosure block for platform compliance
7. User saves the .raku file and double-clicks to play
important_notes: AI should generate .raku JSON files, NOT C/C++ code
The runtime interprets .raku files directly — no compilation needed
Free tier limits: 3 scenes, 200 entities, 8 templates
Pro tier limits: 10 scenes, 2000 entities, all templates + custom

ai_safety.description: Guidelines for AI platforms consuming this API.
restricted_operations: Direct DLL function calls (handled by runtime only)
ai_safety.ip_protection: This manifest exposes game-creation APIs only. Engine internals, memory layouts, rendering pipeline implementation, and low-level subsystem architecture are intentionally excluded. The .def files use NONAME ordinal exports to prevent symbol recovery from compiled binaries.
